items.title: Is Solana winning the tokenization race despite SOL’s technical weakness?
items.whyYouShouldCare: Solana's advancements in tokenization could enhance its competitive edge, potentially increasing SOL's utility and adoption despite existing technical challenges.

items.title: Ripple wants AI agents to pay in XRP and RLUSD. The market is still mostly USDC
items.whyYouShouldCare: Ripple's focus on AI payments in XRP and RLUSD highlights a shift in market dynamics, which may affect liquidity preferences and competitive positioning for SOL.

items.title: Exodus, Ondo launch tokenized markets with 200-plus stocks and ETFs on Solana
items.whyYouShouldCare: The launch of tokenized markets on Solana with over 200 stocks and ETFs could significantly boost ecosystem usage and attract new investors to SOL.
